content_policy: Only original or explicitly licensed content may enter the commercial branch.

lexical_seed.name: thousand-most-common-words
lexical_seed.role: word selection and multilingual term seed

notes: The English bank contains 1000 reviewed lexical cards and 1000 original context cards. English pronunciation uses the Turkish-readable WordPilot v7 convention restored in v8.1.1; IPA display was removed. No DiziÖğren PDF link or copied sentence bank is included. v8.2.0 changes navigation and library presentation only: route panels, mobile course grid, custom card ranges and 50-card pagination. The v7 Turkish-readable pronunciation layer remains unchanged.
